title: Nova Glass Lamp
description: A sculptural table lamp with smoked glass, brushed brass details, and a warm ambient glow designed for modern living rooms and boutique bedrooms.

title: Contour Leather Weekender
description: A soft structured travel bag in matte leather with generous internal compartments, polished hardware, and a silhouette that works from airport to city break.

title: Mono Knit Overshirt
description: An elevated overshirt with a relaxed cut, textured knit finish, and versatile monochrome palette for everyday layering across seasons.

title: Studio Noise-Cancel Headphones
description: Wireless over-ear headphones with adaptive noise canceling, premium foam cushions, and a crisp balanced sound profile tuned for long listening sessions.

title: Modern Table
description: A compact modern table with warm wood tones, rounded edges, and a clean silhouette designed for dining corners, studio apartments, and refined everyday spaces.

title: Pulse Running Sneakers
description: Lightweight trainers with responsive foam, a breathable knit upper, and a streamlined silhouette designed for movement, errands, and casual styling.

title: Orbit Desk Clock
description: A compact desk clock with silent sweep movement, brushed aluminum housing, and a minimal face inspired by gallery interiors and studio workspaces.

title: Frame Sunglasses
description: Bold acetate sunglasses with warm gradient lenses, balanced proportions, and a clean geometric profile for summer city wear.

title: Matte Black Smartwatch
description: A sleek fitness-focused smartwatch with AMOLED display, heart-rate tracking, and a minimal matte-black case designed for all-day wear from gym to office.

title: Linen Relaxed Blazer
description: An unstructured linen blazer with a soft shoulder, patch pockets, and a breathable weave perfect for warm-weather styling and smart-casual events.

title: Walnut Desk Organizer
description: A handcrafted walnut desk organizer with clean lines and multiple compartments for pens, cards, and small tools — a refined addition to any workspace.

title: Canvas Mini Crossbody
description: A compact waxed-canvas crossbody bag with leather trim, adjustable strap, and just enough room for essentials — ideal for markets and weekend walks.

title: Copper Pour-Over Set
description: A polished copper pour-over coffee dripper with a double-wall borosilicate carafe and reusable stainless filter — crafted for ritual and flavor.

title: Suede Chelsea Boots
description: Classic chelsea boots in soft Italian suede with elastic side panels, a slim rubber sole, and a timeless silhouette that pairs with denim or tailoring.

title: Titanium Pen
description: A precision-machined titanium ballpoint pen with a satisfying click mechanism, knurled grip, and a weight that makes every note feel intentional.

title: Oversized Wool Scarf
description: A generously sized merino wool scarf with a subtle herringbone pattern and fringed edges — adds warmth and texture to any cold-weather outfit.

title: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: A compact waterproof speaker with rich 360° sound, 12-hour battery, and a fabric-wrapped body designed for picnics, showers, and impromptu playlists.

title: Ribbed Cotton Tee
description: A staple ribbed-knit tee in premium organic cotton with a slightly cropped relaxed fit — pairs effortlessly with high-waist trousers and layered looks.

title: Terrazzo Coasters Set
description: A set of four terrazzo coasters with cork backing, each featuring a unique chip pattern — functional art for your coffee table or home bar.

title: Leather Card Wallet
description: A slim vegetable-tanned leather card wallet with four slots and a center pocket — ages beautifully and fits comfortably in any front pocket.
